heading: Computation of retired pay: law applicable
label: 1275 Computation of retired pay: law applicable
text: A member of the armed forces retired under this chapter is entitled to retired pay computed under chapter 71 of this title.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1275[No source].[No source].The revised section is based on the various retirement provisions in this chapter and is inserted to make explicit the entitlement to retired pay upon retirement.
